name: Quiche-crustless, Low Fat
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare your egg and milk custard mixture.
2. Add 1 tablespoon of flour to the custard.
3. Beat well to remove any lumps from the flour.
4. Pour the custard over the fillings in a dish.
5. Spray the dish with non-stick baking spray.
6. Cook as normal.
7. During baking, the flour will sink to the bottom of the custard and form a mock crust.
8. This quiche can be made using ordinary white or whole wheat flour, as well as corn and potato flour.
